creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Using it as default from 1st version in ports.

All work fine:
$ pkg info -r samba411

        mpv-0.32.0_4,1
        mplayer-1.4.0.20200621_2
        mencoder-1.4.0.20200621_2
        libxine-1.2.9_13
